content: I will modify `source/ui/CanvasOverlay.h` to assign the control's design-time script to `targetInstance->controlTexts[ctrl.controlID + "_script"]` during player overlay initialization. This links the custom UI code correctly between the Pedal tab editor and play mode.

args.Description: "Map design-time script value to targetInstance controlTexts script key in play mode"
args.Instruction: "Set targetInstance controlTexts script key from ctrl.script"
args.toolAction: "Assigning design script to controlTexts in CanvasOverlay"
